title: Geonosian electro-staff
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|electrostaff}}
[[File:Geonosian_Electro-Staff.jpg|thumb|250px|A [[Human/Legends|Human]] warrior wielding an electro-staff.]]
The '''Geonosian electro-staff''' was a melee weapon that was created and used by the [[Insect/Legends|insect]]-like [[Geonosian/Legends|Geonosians]]. It was a large, two-handed staff which inflicted powerful electric shocks on its target. Because of the [[Speciesism|xenophobic]] nature of the Geonosians, the electro-staff was seldom seen outside of [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]].

This was likely a predecessor of or inspiration for the Geonosian [[Static pike/Legends|static pike]], in combination with the [[Geonosian spear]].

{{Weapon-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''
